title: Youtube Poop: Donkey Kong Sells His Liver For Banana Cream Pie
description:
Didn't I say no news, no calls, no tyranny until tomorrow!

That's right. Another DKC Poop. But this time, I made it with lightspeed randomness.

Sorry for not making more videos sooner. The critics' response to "Dr. Wily Finally Does It" discouraged me for awhile. 

Video/Audio Used: 

Donkey Kong Country cartoon 
Mario vs Donkey Kong 
Street Fighter cartoon 
Link: The Faces of Evil 
E3 2007 Nintendo Press Conference
